title: canthium setiflorum subsp. telidosma
intro: Canthium setiflorum subsp. telidosma, also known as the Telidosma or African boxwood, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and cardiovascular protective properties. In herbal preparations, Canthium setiflorum subsp. telidosma is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
